title: Robot Control Room
summary: Robot registration, callback updates, secret rotation, and Data API token generation now live together in one dashboard.

items: New Robot & Data API dashboard at /account/robots for viewing owned robots and registering new ones
Robot cards now support callback URL updates and secret rotation without leaving the dashboard
Robot accounts now track their owning user so the dashboard only shows your registered robots
The topbar user menu is regrouped into Account, Automation, Product, and Legal sections

title: Changelog System
summary: You can now see what's new after each deploy.

items: Version upgrade banner now shows the latest release summary
Added What's New links to the app menu and landing page
